titles.title: Closer/ Wrap Me in Your Arms

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Into your arms I'm drawing near again To dwell with you It's my only heart's desire It's my only heart's desire

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All I can do Is fall on my knees and cry Cleanse me with fire And purify my heart And purify my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Draw me close Closer than before Closer than I've ever been

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Wrap me in your arms Wrap me in your arms Wrap me in your arms, oh God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So take me to that place Lord To that secret place where I can be with you You can make me like you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Wrap me in your arms Wrap me in your arms Wrap me in your arms You might also like Wrap me in your arms
